name: Austrian Chocolate Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and margarine in a medium saucepan over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and stir in sugar, egg, yolk, and vanilla until well combined.
3. Mix in flour and nuts.
4. Shape into 3/4-inch balls and place on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 8-12 minutes.
6. Melt one more chocolate square with margarine over low heat.
7. Add the remaining ingredients and blend well.
8. Dip cookies in glaze to cover, then allow them to dry completely before storing in a tightly covered container with waxed paper between layers.
